summary: Verification for the nonterminal W1623 W1519 closed-embedding-closedness checkpoint. The patch adds a one-input route that extracts W973 closed-embedding closedness data from the W1519 selected-cochain convergence surface, derives W718 closed-embedding diagram components and the W519 mapped-cokernel closed-embedding provider, converts those closed embeddings to closed maps, builds W735 closed-map exact inputs, and feeds the existing W1622 direct-localization boundary route. This is not original four-task product success and does not construct a nullary positive witness.
